question: 为什么2026年中国航空公司燃油费屡次上调？
must_cover: Middle East geopolitical conflict pushed international crude oil prices up
Fuel cost is roughly 30%-33% of major Chinese carriers' operating cost
Domestic fuel surcharge was raised at least twice (April 5 and May 16, 2026)
The April adjustment magnitude reached about 500%
must_not_claim: Specific future surcharge adjustments beyond May 2026
International airline comparison data not present in the sources
notes: Derived from docs/燃油费报告.md. Chinese-language case; exercises full-width punctuation in citation grounding.
